description_long: This warehouse is a large, rectangular industrial building with a flat roof and dark exterior walls, likely constructed from concrete or metal panels. The roof features a series of evenly spaced rectangular skylights or vents, and there are prominent metallic railings or safety barriers along the roof edges, especially at the corners. The facade is punctuated by a series of horizontal and vertical slits or windows, and there are several large entry bays or loading dock doors visible on the shorter sides. The structure sits on a broad, flat base, possibly representing a paved lot or loading area. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on function, typical of urban storage or distribution facilities.
description: A large, dark, rectangular warehouse with a flat roof, skylights, and prominent metal railings, featuring multiple loading bays and minimal decorative elements.
description_view_0: The long side of the warehouse is visible, showing multiple skylights on the roof and two corner roof railings.
description_view_1: The short end of the warehouse is shown, highlighting several large loading dock doors and a prominent corner railing.
description_view_2: The opposite long side is visible, with a similar arrangement of skylights and roof railings as view 0.
description_view_3: The other short end is shown, featuring more loading dock doors and a clear view of the roof's safety barriers.
attribute_facade_design: The main facade features dark, industrial wall panels with a series of horizontal and vertical window slits and several large loading dock doors. Metal safety railings are visible at the roof edges, and the overall appearance is functional and unadorned.
attribute_roof_structure: The roof is flat and covered with a series of rectangular skylights or vents, bordered by metallic safety railings at the corners and edges. The surface appears to be made of dark, weather-resistant material.
